page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7se.8xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor operating at 2.9 GHz. The system is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, and it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place this instance consistently in the average tier for most compute and memory operations, with a few notable exceptions. The Intel Xeon processor delivers a single-core stress-ng score of 1856.69 and a multi-core score of 31060.72. Memory performance is robust, with a PassMark memory score of 2777.67 and a multi-threaded bzip3 decompression rate of 161.27 GB/sec, both ranking in the top 25% tier. For language model workloads, the instance achieves a strong text generation speed of 301.47 tokens/second using a small 135M model, though larger 7B model prompt processing remains in the average tier at 63.05 tokens/second.

The lack of bundled local storage means all storage operations must rely on network-attached volumes, which represents a key architectural tradeoff for disk-heavy workloads. However, the dedicated CPU allocation and high memory bandwidth read-only cached speed of 1682.59 GB/sec offer reliable, non-shared compute resources. This makes the ecs.g7se.8xlarge qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring predictable CPU performance without the overhead of local storage management. Suitable workloads include static web serving, database operations, software compilation, and medium-scale text processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7se.8xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor with 32 dedicated physical cores and 128.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor with an x86_64 architecture, it provides a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, and no bundled local storage. Benchmark results show average-tier performance across most compute and memory tests, with strong results in PassMark memory testing and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. The instance is suited for workloads such as static web serving, database operations, and software compilation that require dedicated CPU resources but do not depend on local NVMe storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7se.8xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering stable compute and memory performance.

tagline: A dedicated 32-core Intel Xeon instance with 128 GB RAM, offering balanced compute and strong memory bandwidth for general-purpose workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.9 GHz
128.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage bundled
Strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and PassMark memory performance
Well-suited for static web serving, database operations, and software compilation
